name: NBHD Usage Reporter
description: Reports LLM usage from agent turns back to the NBHD control-plane for token and message counter synchronization.

apiBaseUrl.description: Override NBHD API base URL. Defaults to NBHD_API_BASE_URL env var.

tenantId.description: Override tenant ID. Defaults to NBHD_TENANT_ID env var.

internalApiKey.description: Override internal API key. Defaults to NBHD_INTERNAL_API_KEY env var.

requestTimeoutMs.description: HTTP timeout for usage reporting requests.
